rationale: Friction is severe across the board: a calm finger-on-jigsaw hook contradicts Mob Control's energetic aim-and-shoot, mob-multiplier loop and would mislead installs into a hard bounce. The muted grey/green/blue member palette also clashes with the game's high-contrast royal purple + yellow signature, and the puzzle archetype skews older/female-leaning casual — opposite of the 18-35 male-skewing action audience. Do not adapt this archetype directly; if testing satisfaction beats, port only the 'oddly satisfying' emotional pitch into a gates-and-crowd-growth visual instead.
